subcodes.first_line: Glory be to Him Who hath sent down the verses and made manifest the signs with a sovereignty that neither armies could withstand nor the might of them that disbelieved [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الذی انزل الایات و اظهر العلامات بسلطان لم تمنعه الجنود و لا سطوة الذین کفروا
